titleStmt.title: SII 4.1068: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1068. (A.R. No. 227 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL BETWEEN THE THIRD AND THE FOURTH PILLARS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
dhipaŠł•
mmńĀŠĻĀbikńĀpatyayŇćŠł•.prńĀptasvargganivńĀsayŇćrapi hitńď karŠĻánńĀŠĻ≠a puŠĻáyaprńĀptividhńďya
svńĀminńď ŇõrńęmadbhńęmamahńďŇõvarńĀya daŇõadigbhittisphuratkńęrttayńď . prńĀdńĀditthamatńęvanirmmalamatissaujanyaviŇõrńĀmabhŇęrńĀca
ŠĻĀdrńĀrkkamakhaŠĻáŠłćamaŠĻáŠłćitadaŇõaŠĻĀ saddńępikńĀpaŠĻĀcakaŠĻĀ . ŇõakavarŠĻ£a 1061 ŇõrńękulŇćttuŠĻĀggacŇćŠłćadńďvara divyarńĀjyasaŠĻĀva 7 gu ŇõrńĀ
hi ŇõrńęmanmahńĀmaŠĻáŠłćalńďŇõvara kulŇćttuŠĻĀggacŇćŠłćagoŠĻĀkkarńĀjula mńĀmasvasti samadhikasamarasamŇćpńĀrjjita jayńĀŠĻĀgganńĀliŠĻĀggita da
kŠĻ£iŠĻáadŇćrddaŠĻáŠłća nirkkuvagaŠĻáŠłća vairibhńĀŠĻĀggńĀra bhńĀvanaŠĻĀkakńĀŠĻüa UbhayabalasubhaŠĻ≠amunnaŠĻüiva kalikaŠĻüakalitanammeŠĻüuva caturtthaku
laŇõńďkhara gaŠĻáŠłćaguŠĻáńĀkaru(ŠĻĀ)ŠĻáŠłćaina ŇõrńęmaddaŠĻáŠłćanńĀyaka mńĀmapeŠĻáŠłćaya ŇõrńębhńęmńďŇõvaramahńĀdńďvarakuŠĻĀdama taŠĻáŠłćrimńĀrinńĀyaku
nikiŠĻĀ beŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina AkhaŠĻáŠłćavartti diviya 1 tama talli mallńĀsńĀnikiŠĻĀ beŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina AkhaŠĻáŠłćavartti diviya 1 tamakugńĀŠĻĀ beŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina AkhaŠĻáŠłća
vartti diviya 1 tama koŠłćuku mńĀrinńĀyakunikigńĀŠĻĀ beŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina AkhaŠĻáŠłćavartti diviya 1 reŠĻáŠłćavu koŠłćku marinńĀyakuniki
ŠĻĀ beŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina diviya 1 kilaramuna bŇćlu naluvuruŠĻĀ bŇęŠĻáŠĻ≠agńĀ modaliyaŠłćapuna bhńęmabŇćla yńĀyti vasamuna viŠłći
InupaEŠłćlu 50 nityapaŠłći nńďtimńĀ 1 reŠĻáŠłćavunaŠłćapuna ŠĻüoŠĻĀpabŇćla meŠĻáŠĻ≠ani vasamuna viŠłćisina InupaEŠłćlu 50
ŠĻáŠłćavuyaŠłćapuna navńĀlakńĀprŇćlani vasamuna viŠłćisina InupaEŠłćlu 50 nityapaŠłći nńďti mńĀ 1
niccina InupaEŠłćlu 50 nityapaŠłći lapu naŠłćapuna kńĀmana prŇćlani vasamu
khitaŠĻĀ peddanńĀcńĀ Some lines of writing on the same slab at its right end run as follows:‚ÄĒ
muna
kńĀŠĻ≠amaseŠĻ≠i talli ńÄytama ŇõrńębhńęmńďŇõvaramahńĀdńďvaraku
peŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina Akha(ŠĻĀ)ŠĻáŠłćava¬®rtti lŇćhadaŠĻĀŠłću diviya 1 (Lines 5 to 8 are very faintly cut)
Digital edition of SII 4.1068 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
